overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a white coat exploring a dimly lit industrial sci-fi interior. The character walks through a break room with NPCs, interacts with a refrigerator, then proceeds through corridors with bunk beds. The environment features metal walls, exposed pipes, and artificial lighting typical of a space station or underground facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial break room with dining area

events.description: passes by NPCs seated at metal dining table on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through industrial quarters towards the back wall refrigerator

notable_agents.action: two individuals seated at metal table, engaged in conversation or eating

entered.detail: long metal table with chairs where two NPCs are seated
large white double-door industrial refrigerator unit against back wall
metal counter with microwave, containers, and kitchen equipment
large industrial ventilation pipes running along ceiling and walls
tall white metal storage lockers near the dining area

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit industrial break room. Two NPCs sit at a metal table on the left. The room features exposed pipes, kitchen counters with equipment, and a large white refrigerator at the far end. The environment has a sci-fi industrial aesthetic with metal walls and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchen appliance area with refrigerator interaction

events.description: opens the refrigerator door revealing blue-lit interior with supplies
closes refrigerator and turns toward the corridor exit

agents.ego_description: opens the refrigerator to inspect contents, then closes it and walks toward the corridor doorway

entered.detail: blue-lit interior of refrigerator showing food containers and bottles
doorway leading to the sleeping quarters corridor

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and opens the industrial refrigerator, revealing its blue-lit interior stocked with supplies. After a brief inspection, the door is closed and the character turns toward a doorway leading to a corridor. The dining area is now behind as the character moves toward the next area.

scene_state.functional_zone: sleeping quarters corridor with bunk beds

events.description: exits kitchen area and enters corridor with bunk beds
turns left to closely examine the metal bunk beds

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor, examining the bunk beds and surroundings in the sleeping quarters

entered.detail: stacked metal bunk beds with mattresses and pillows, industrial military style
metal shelving units with cardboard boxes and supplies
worn green upholstered armchair in corner of the bunk room
tall metal locker cabinet against the wall near the bunks

segments.scene_description: The character enters a corridor leading to sleeping quarters, passing metal bunk beds and storage shelves. The environment maintains the industrial aesthetic with exposed pipes and metal flooring. The character explores the area, turning to examine the bunk beds closely before continuing toward a distant doorway. The refrigerator and kitchen area are now far behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial break room that transitions into a narrow corridor of sleeping quarters. It begins by following a character in a white coat through a sci-fi dining area filled with exposed pipes and NPCs seated at a metal table. As the character reaches the far end of the room, the camera focuses on the opening of a blue-lit industrial refrigerator before the character turns away from the kitchen equipment. The scene then shifts as the character exits the break room and enters a metallic corridor, passing by storage shelves and rows of bunk beds. Finally, the camera lingers on the details of the sleeping quarters before moving toward a distant doorway, leaving the dining area far behind.
